# nngocson2002.github.io

Personal academic website of **Son Nguyen**, AI Research Resident at FPT Software AI Center.

Live at: [nngocson2002.github.io](https://nngocson2002.github.io)

## About

This site showcases my research, publications, and background. Built with Jekyll and hosted on GitHub Pages.

## Run Locally

```bash
bundle install
bundle exec jekyll serve --livereload
```

Then open `http://localhost:4000`.
